narrative:
Lee Township has 1,984 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
